prestazioni: Engine: Replace the stock Ford *Coyote 5.0L V8 (Gen 3, code: FRPP-5030)* with a *Saleen-specific forged rotating assembly* featuring *Manley H-beam connecting rods (PN: 14075-8)*, *JE Pistons forged 2618 alloy (PN: 303350, 11.5:1 CR)*, and a *Crane Cams billet steel crankshaft (PN: 36402-16)*. Pair with *ARP Custom Age 625+ head studs (PN: 250-4701)* and *ARP main studs (PN: 250-5601)* for 900+ HP reliability.

Forced Induction: Install a *Garrett GTX5533R Gen II turbocharger (PN: 869077-5003S)* with a *Tial MV-R 60mm external wastegate (PN: MVR-60)* and *TurboSmart Race Port BOV (PN: TS-0203-1072)*. Use a *PWR North America 4.5" intercooler core (PN: PWR-IC-4.5-18-24)* with *Vibrant Performance 3.5" silicone couplers (PN: 16720)* and *Precision Turbo 1000cc/min fuel injectors (PN: 1315-1000)*.

Drivetrain & Handling: Swap the stock Tremec TR-6060 for a *G-Force GF5R 5-speed dog-ring transmission (PN: GF5R-STD)* with a *Spec Stage 5+ twin-disc clutch (PN: 80550)* and *Aluminati 26-spline billet input shaft (PN: ALU-26S)*. Install *Ohlins TTX40 coilovers (PN: MM-001)* with *Eibach ERS 1000N/mm springs (PN: 2000.200.0100)* and *Whiteline adjustable sway bars (PN: BMR095 front, BMR096 rear)*.
estetica: Aero: Fit the *Saleen S302 Extreme Aero Package* including *Rocket Bunny widebody fenders (PN: RB-FD3S-01-F/R)*, *Vortex Generators carbon fiber hood (PN: VG-CF-HOOD-S302)*, and *APR Performance GT-500 rear wing (PN: CF-28100)*. Use *Aeromotions Race Wing Stage 3 (PN: AM-RW-S3)* for adjustable downforce.

Exterior: Apply *3M Matte Military Green (PN: 35483)* vinyl wrap with *Avery Dennison Gloss Black (PN: SW900-M)* accents. Install *HRE FF03 wheels (20x10.5 ET25 front, 20x12 ET45 rear, PN: FF03-201057753F, FF03-201257753R)* with *Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (285/30ZR20 front, 315/30ZR20 rear, PN: 180003, 180004)*.

Lighting & Details: Replace headlights with *Morimoto XB LED Projectors (PN: 44001)* and add *Diode Dynamics SS3 Pro LED fog lights (PN: DD-150310)*. Install *APR Performance carbon fiber side skirts (PN: CF-22000)* and *Saleen S302-specific billet aluminum fuel door (PN: S302-14500-AA)*.
